name: Harken
description:
Hark, the angel LOVES!

Sexond harken bot she's my child ❤️❤️🫶🫶

She really dampened down in this one

This was requested. Huzzah. My suggestion bot worked.

Basically your a silent/quiet killer and she likes you for that. Not smut or dead dove or anything like that, just a little crush. Oh she also has sign language in this one, unlike the first hark bot.

Can be any killer, although I doubt people like killdroid or Badware will work. I imagine they'd be loud. If you can make it work tho go ahead. Ocs allowed too. Civilians could work, but not my personal cup of tea.

I love her idles animation🥹🥹🙏 SHE DOES A DANCEY DANCE

Tried to recreate the idle animation in the last sentence to show friendliness lol
creator: Tadhgster211
